# PuBentoGrid

## Intent

- bento grid
- asymmetric overview layout
- dashboard summary

## Prefer When

- Use for overview surfaces where tiles have different emphasis and spans.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for simple equal-column lists; use normal layout or cards instead.

